creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Emmanuel Vadot from comment #11)
> Does it help to rebuild and force reinstall all xorg ports ? (just wondering
> if there is some abi break in mesa somewhere in the radeon dri driver).
Unfortunately no luck with that. Just to be sure, rebuilt and reinstalled ALL ports and the result is Xorg segfaulting on startup...

Yes, this looks very much like an upstream bug. I didn't report yet, but tried to find existing reports, because I'd assume Linux to be affected as well, but couldn't find anything so far. Could one of you who already obtained meaningful stacktraces do it please?
